::: {#glyphs}
[![](images/Orcid%20logo.svg)](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3985-2919){target="_blank" title="ORCiD"}
[![](images/github-mark.svg)](https://github.com/jcausey-astate/ASRI-2026){target="_blank" title="View on GitHub"}
:::

# Notebooks for [ASRI-2026](https://www.arkansasedc.com/arkansas-nsf-epscor/division/data-analytics-that-are-robust-trusted-(dart)/arkansas-summer-research-institute) Summer Workshops

[Content will appear below as each workshop is held.]{.note}


## June 04: Regression Techniques in Python (Intermediate)

::: {.indented}

#### Workshop version (with open exercises to complete)

<https://colab.research.google.com/github/jcausey-astate/ASRI-2026/blob/main/python_intermediate_regression_ASRI26.ipynb>



#### Completed version for reference

<https://colab.research.google.com/github/jcausey-astate/ASRI-2026/blob/main/python_intermediate_regression_complete_ASRI26.ipynb>

#### [Non-interactive web version](python_intermediate_regression_complete_ASRI26.html)

:::

## June 05: Classification Techniques in Python (Intermediate)

::: {.indented}

#### Workshop version (with open exercises to complete)

<https://colab.research.google.com/github/jcausey-astate/ASRI-2026/blob/main/python_intermediate_classification_ASRI26.ipynb>

#### Completed version for reference

_This notebook will be posted soon after the workshop ends._

<!-- 
<https://colab.research.google.com/github/jcausey-astate/ASRI-2026/blob/main/python_intermediate_classification_complete_ASRI26.ipynb>

#### [Non-interactive web version](python_intermediate_classification_complete_ASRI26.html)
 -->

:::

## June 09: Clustering Techniques in Python (Intermediate)

<!-- ::: {.indented}

#### Workshop version (with open exercises to complete)

<https://colab.research.google.com/github/jcausey-astate/ASRI-2026/blob/main/python_intermediate_clustering_ASRI26.ipynb>

#### Completed version for reference

<https://colab.research.google.com/github/jcausey-astate/ASRI-2026/blob/main/python_intermediate_clustering_complete_ASRI26.ipynb>

#### [Non-interactive web version](python_intermediate_clustering_complete_ASRI26.html)

::: -->

:::{#footer}
2026 [Jason L. Causey](https://jasoncausey.net/cv/){target=_blank},  [Department of Computer Science, Arkansas State University](https://www.astate.edu/colleges/engineering-and-computer-science/computer-science.html){target=_blank}. [ORCiD: 0000-0002-3985-2919](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3985-2919){target=_blank}
:::
